title: Michigan Now Has Highest EV Registration Fees in the U.S. After New Road Funding Law
content: Michigan has raised EV and hybrid registration fees to the highest in the nation as part of a new roadâ€‘funding law tied to fuel tax increases. Critics say the hike unfairly burdens EV owners, while supporters argue it ensures drivers contribute equally to road repairs. The change comes amid slow EV adoption and declining federal incentives.
author: Analysts Account
